name: sewage
instructions:
["There are two plants, Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber, in the small town of Huxley. Every day, both plants send their sewage to a water treatment facility. The water facility only filters sewage from the two plants, and it is only capable of filtering 83 gallons of sewage per day. So, if Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber together produce more than 83 gallons of sewage on a given day, then the river will get polluted that day.

Based on the average amount of sewage Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber each produce per day, the town's river often gets polluted with sewage.","We will show you how much sewage each of the two plants produced on 40 days in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual days. For each day, you will be asked whether the river was polluted.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how many gallons of sewage are produced by each plant on average."]
learning: {"stim1":"Huxley Steel produced ","stim2":" of sewage. ","stim3":"Huxley Lumber produced ","stim4":" of sewage.","question":"Did the river get polluted today?","alert":"Remember that the river gets polluted whenever Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber produce more than 83 gallons of sewage in total."}
man_check: {"c":"On average, how many gallons of sewage does Huxley Steel produce each day?","a":"On average, how many gallons of sewage does Huxley Lumber produce each day?"}
judgment: {"reminder":"As a reminder, the water facility is capable of filtering 83 gallons of sewage per day.","vignette":"Today, Huxley Steel sent 84 gallons of sewage to the water treatment facility and Huxley Lumber sent 84 gallons of sewage to the water treatment facility. Together, they sent 168 gallons of sewage to the water treatment plant. So, the river got polluted.","statement":"Huxley Steel producing 84 gallons of sewage caused the river to get polluted today."}
vibe_check:
{"c":"

How surprised were you that Huxley Steel produced 84 gallons of sewage?

","a":"

How surprised were you that Huxley Lumber produced 84 gallons of sewage?

"}

So, if Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber together produce more than 83 gallons of sewage on a given day, then the river will get polluted that day.

The water facility only filters sewage from the two plants, and it is only capable of filtering 83 gallons of sewage per day. So, if Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber together produce more than 83 gallons of sewage on a given day, then the river will get polluted that day.

Based on the average amount of sewage Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber each produce per day, the town's river often gets polluted with sewage.","We will show you how much sewage each of the two plants produced on 40 days in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual days. For each day, you will be asked whether the river was polluted.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how many gallons of sewage are produced by each plant on average."]

So, if Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber together produce more than 83 gallons of sewage on a given day, then the river will get polluted that day.

Based on the average amount of sewage Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber each produce per day, the town's river often gets polluted with sewage.","We will show you how much sewage each of the two plants produced on 40 days in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual days. For each day, you will be asked whether the river was polluted.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how many gallons of sewage are produced by each plant on average."]

The water facility only filters sewage from the two plants, and it is only capable of filtering 83 gallons of sewage per day. So, if Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber together produce more than 83 gallons of sewage on a given day, then the river will get polluted that day.

Based on the average amount of sewage Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber each produce per day, the town's river often gets polluted with sewage.","We will show you how much sewage each of the two plants produced on 40 days in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual days. For each day, you will be asked whether the river was polluted.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how many gallons of sewage are produced by each plant on average."]

The water facility only filters sewage from the two plants, and it is only capable of filtering 83 gallons of sewage per day. So, if Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber together produce more than 83 gallons of sewage on a given day, then the river will get polluted that day.

Based on the average amount of sewage Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber each produce per day, the town's river often gets polluted with sewage.","We will show you how much sewage each of the two plants produced on 40 days in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual days. For each day, you will be asked whether the river was polluted.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how many gallons of sewage are produced by each plant on average."]

["There are two plants, Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber, in the small town of Huxley. Every day, both plants send their sewage to a water treatment facility. The water facility only filters sewage from the two plants, and it is only capable of filtering 83 gallons of sewage per day. So, if Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber together produce more than 83 gallons of sewage on a given day, then the river will get polluted that day.

Based on the average amount of sewage Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber each produce per day, the town's river often gets polluted with sewage.","We will show you how much sewage each of the two plants produced on 40 days in total, separated into 4 blocks of 10 individual days. For each day, you will be asked whether the river was polluted.

At the end of each block, you will be asked how many gallons of sewage are produced by each plant on average."]
learning: {"stim1":"Huxley Steel produced ","stim2":" of sewage. ","stim3":"Huxley Lumber produced ","stim4":" of sewage.","question":"Did the river get polluted today?","alert":"Remember that the river gets polluted whenever Huxley Steel and Huxley Lumber produce more than 83 gallons of sewage in total."}
man_check: {"c":"On average, how many gallons of sewage does Huxley Steel produce each day?","a":"On average, how many gallons of sewage does Huxley Lumber produce each day?"}
judgment: {"reminder":"As a reminder, the water facility is capable of filtering 83 gallons of sewage per day.","vignette":"Today, Huxley Steel sent 84 gallons of sewage to the water treatment facility and Huxley Lumber sent 84 gallons of sewage to the water treatment facility. Together, they sent 168 gallons of sewage to the water treatment plant. So, the river got polluted.","statement":"Huxley Steel producing 84 gallons of sewage caused the river to get polluted today."}

{"c":"

How surprised were you that Huxley Steel produced 84 gallons of sewage?

","a":"

How surprised were you that Huxley Lumber produced 84 gallons of sewage?

"}
